creator: iron.udjin@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Michael Tuexen from comment #6)

According to tests I found a few years ago, HTCP performs faster congestion window recovery than NEWRENO in high throughput and low latency networks (1G/10G links). But I don't quite sure if it correctly works with RACK enabled. Probably I should try NEWRENO with RACK. I would be nice if you claryfy this question.
